name: example-scraper
description: A simple example scraper that fetches and extracts page info from multiple domains using basic HTTP requests
title: Example Scraper

inputSchema.title: Example Scraper Input
inputSchema.description: Configure the scraper with a list of domains to scrape

domains.title: Domains to Scrape
domains.description: List of domains to fetch and extract info from. Can be domain names (example.com) or full URLs (https://example.com)

timeout.title: Request Timeout (ms)
timeout.description: Timeout in milliseconds for each HTTP request
